title: FarmItCraft
description:
A small collection of mods & tweaks for my own Minecraft worlds, which I share with a few friends. 

Aiming to provide a Vanilla+ experience - primarily focussed on the vanilla Minecraft we all know and love, but with some Quality Of Life improvements.
body:
A small collection of mods & tweaks for my own Minecraft worlds, which I share with a few friends.

 

Aiming to provide a Vanilla+ experience - primarily focussed on the vanilla Minecraft we all know and love, but with some Quality Of Life improvements to make some things a little better - and heavily inspired by Hermitcraft.

 

Mods include:

- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) to talk to your friends within the game
- MiniHUD to display useful things on screen, such as co-ordinates, light levels and biomes
- Tweakeroo for useful tools like auto-clicking at mob farms
- Litematica to import build schematics from a Creative world and rebuild your favourite creations
- [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling) to remove the monotony of breaking and placing a villager's workstation to get that perfect trade
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) for client-side performance improvements
